title: Minecoin
description: Get FAKE minecoins to buy and trade!
body:
This data pack adds Minecoins into Java Edition. This can be used to purchase things from your server or any other packs that are supported. (Look Below For More Info) In survival you can break 100 of the same natural blocks (stone, ores, logs, etc.) it will give you one Minecoin.

## Disclaimer
> This datapack is not affiliated with Mojang and has no real-world value nor is it related to the Bedrock Edition Minecoin currency.

## Commands
See what your balance is.
```mcfunction
/trigger Balance or /trigger Bal
```

Hold your coins then run triggers to add to the balance.
```mcfunction
/trigger AddMoney set [AMOUNT]
```

Converts balance to coins (so you can share or use)
```mcfunction
/trigger ExtractMoney set [AMOUNT]
```

Minecoin Settings (have to be operator perms)
```mcfunction
/function minecoin:settings or /function minecoin:config
```


view other players account/balance (have to be op) - experimental 
```mcfunction
/function minecoin:view_account
```

## Dependent Packs
- [Vending Machine Datapack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/vending-machine-datapack)

## FAQ
### Can I add this to my mod pack?
Sure, as long as you give proper credit and follow the license.

### Are you going to downgrade to older versions (ie; 1.15, 1.12, 1.8)?
I will if there is enough demand for a certain version and I have time to.
